stories.title: Establish Data Sources
stories.user_story: As a data engineer, I want to identify and connect to all relevant data sources, so that we can create a single source of truth.
acceptance_criteria: All relevant data sources are documented.
Data connections are established and tested.
Data sources are compliant with GDPR.

stories.title: Data Integration
stories.user_story: As a data engineer, I want to integrate data from multiple sources into a unified database, so that we have a single source of truth.
acceptance_criteria: Data from all identified sources is integrated into the database.
Data integrity checks are performed.
Integration process is automated.

stories.title: Implement Data Governance
stories.user_story: As a compliance officer, I want to ensure that all data handling is GDPR compliant, so that we protect customer privacy.
acceptance_criteria: Data handling processes are documented.
GDPR compliance checklist is completed.
Regular audits are scheduled.

stories.title: Create Business Dashboards
stories.user_story: As a business analyst, I want to create interactive dashboards, so that stakeholders can visualize customer analytics.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboards are designed based on stakeholder requirements.
Dashboards pull data from the unified database.
Dashboards are user-tested and feedback is incorporated.

stories.title: User Training for Dashboards
stories.user_story: As a trainer, I want to develop training materials for the dashboards, so that users can effectively utilize the analytics.
acceptance_criteria: Training materials are created and reviewed.
Training sessions are scheduled.
User feedback is collected post-training.

stories.title: Performance Testing of the Platform
stories.user_story: As a QA engineer, I want to perform performance testing on the analytics platform, so that we ensure it can handle expected loads.
acceptance_criteria: Performance benchmarks are established.
Load testing is conducted.
Performance issues are documented and addressed.

stories.title: Spike: Evaluate Analytics Tools
stories.user_story: As a product owner, I want to evaluate different analytics tools, so that we choose the best fit for our needs.
acceptance_criteria: At least three analytics tools are evaluated.
Pros and cons of each tool are documented.
Recommendations are presented to stakeholders.
